[View commit history for this file.](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/commits/main/) 15 Commits | | [AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json "AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json") | [AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json "AgentEvaluationsTranscript.json") | [Add files via upload](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/commit/497860c1b307ec613e0a3cf454c7f938f28e1240 "Add files via upload") | 6 months agoNov 9, 2025 | | [README.md](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/README.md "README.md") | [README.md](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/README.md "README.md") | [Update README.md](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/commit/4d712dabf27fbddb399fd246d03efca23fef3d41 "Update README.md") | 6 months agoNov 9, 2025 | | [workflow.json](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/workflow.json "workflow.json") | [workflow.json](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/blob/main/workflow.json "workflow.json") | [replace google, supabase, sheets](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep/commit/98c7a204eee403898215a8b00825c654aae8dc91 "replace google, supabase, sheets replace: drive -> local fs sheets -> airtable supabase -> simple vector") | 6 months agoNov 10, 2025 | | View all files | ## Repository files navigation - [README](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#) # n8n Workshop Prep [Permalink: n8n Workshop Prep](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#n8n-workshop-prep) This repository contains a test workflow to verify your n8n credentials before the workshop. Follow the steps below to ensure all required integrations are properly configured. ## Prerequisites [Permalink: Prerequisites](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#prerequisites) - An n8n instance (cloud or self-hosted) - Google account with access to Gmail, Google Drive, and Google Sheets - OpenAI API account - Apify account - Supabase account ## Setup Instructions [Permalink: Setup Instructions](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#setup-instructions) ### 1\. Download the Workflow [Permalink: 1. Download the Workflow](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#1-download-the-workflow) Download the `workflow.json` file from this repository: - Click on `workflow.json` in the repository - Click the "Download" or "Raw" button to save the file locally ### 2\. Import the Workflow into n8n [Permalink: 2. Import the Workflow into n8n](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#2-import-the-workflow-into-n8n) 1. Open your n8n instance 2. Click on "Workflows" in the main menu 3. Click the "Import from File" button (or use the menu: ⋮ → Import from File) 4. Select the downloaded `workflow.json` file 5. The workflow "Workshop Credentials Test Workflow" will be imported ### 3\. Set Up Credentials [Permalink: 3. Set Up Credentials](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#3-set-up-credentials) You'll need to configure credentials for the following services in n8n: #### Google Drive [Permalink: Google Drive](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#google-drive) 1. Go to the "Google Drive - Create File" node 2. Click on "Credential to connect with" 3. Create or select your Google Drive OAuth2 credentials 4. Authorize n8n to access your Google Drive #### Google Sheets [Permalink: Google Sheets](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#google-sheets) 1. Go to the "Google Sheets - Read" node 2. Click on "Credential to connect with" 3. Create or select your Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials 4. Authorize n8n to access your Google Sheets #### Gmail [Permalink: Gmail](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#gmail) 1. Go to the "Gmail - Create Draft" node 2. Click on "Credential to connect with" 3. Create or select your Gmail OAuth2 credentials 4. Authorize n8n to access your Gmail #### OpenAI [Permalink: OpenAI](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#openai) 1. Go to the "OpenAI Chat Model" node 2. Click on "Credential to connect with" 3. Create new OpenAI API credentials 4. Enter your OpenAI API key #### Apify [Permalink: Apify](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#apify) 1. Create an account at [https://apify.com/](https://apify.com/) 2. Go to [https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations](https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations) 3. Create a new token 4. Go to the "Apify HTTP Request" node in the workflow 5. Replace `YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN_HERE` in the token field with your actual Apify token ### 4\. Create Test Data in Google Sheets [Permalink: 4. Create Test Data in Google Sheets](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#4-create-test-data-in-google-sheets) #### Create a Test Spreadsheet [Permalink: Create a Test Spreadsheet](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#create-a-test-spreadsheet) 1. Open Google Sheets ( [https://sheets.google.com](https://sheets.google.com/)) 2. Create a new Google Sheet (e.g., "Workshop Test Data") 3. Add a column header in cell A1: "Name" 4. Add your name in cell A2 (e.g., "Gilad") 5. Copy the spreadsheet ID from the URL (the long string between `/d/` and `/edit`) - Example: `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DEF...ABC/edit` → sheet ID is `1DEF...ABC` #### Create Supabase Vector Table [Permalink: Create Supabase Vector Table](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#create-supabase-vector-table) 1. Log in to your Supabase account ( [https://supabase.com](https://supabase.com/)) 2. Go to your project's SQL Editor 3. Create a table using the following SQL (src: [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/ai/langchain?database-method=sql&queryGroups=database-method):) ``` -- Enable the pgvector extension to work with embedding vectors create extension vector; -- Create a table to store your documents create table documents ( id bigserial primary key, content text, -- corresponds to Document.pageContent metadata jsonb, -- corresponds to Document.metadata embedding extensions.vector(1536) -- 1536 works for OpenAI embeddings, change if needed ); -- Create a function to search for documents create function match_documents ( query_embedding extensions.vector(1536), match_count int default null, filter jsonb DEFAULT '{}' ) returns table ( id bigint, content text, metadata jsonb, similarity float ) language plpgsql as $$ #variable_conflict use_column begin return query select id, content, metadata, 1 - (documents.embedding <=> query_embedding) as similarity from documents where metadata @> filter order by documents.embedding <=> query_embedding limit match_count; end; $$; ``` 4. Execute the SQL to create the table ### 5\. Update Node Parameters [Permalink: 5. Update Node Parameters](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#5-update-node-parameters) #### Update the Google Sheets Node [Permalink: Update the Google Sheets Node](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#update-the-google-sheets-node) 1. Open the "Google Sheets - Read" node 2. Replace `YOUR_SHEET_ID_HERE` with your actual spreadsheet ID 3. Ensure the sheet name matches (default is "Sheet1") ### 6\. Test the Workflow [Permalink: 6. Test the Workflow](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#6-test-the-workflow) #### Test Part 1: Google Integration Flow [Permalink: Test Part 1: Google Integration Flow](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#test-part-1-google-integration-flow) 1. Click the "Execute Workflow" button at the top 2. Click on the "Manual Trigger" node 3. Click "Execute node" to run the workflow 4. Monitor the execution: - The workflow should create a file called "n8n-workshop-test.txt" in your Google Drive - It should read your name from the Google Sheet - It should create a draft email in your Gmail with subject "n8n workshop draft" - It should make a successful request to the Apify API 5. Verify the results: - Check your Google Drive for the new text file - Verify the Google Sheets node output shows your name - Check Gmail drafts for the draft email - Verify the Apify HTTP Request node shows a successful response (green status) #### Test Part 2: Chat with AI Agent [Permalink: Test Part 2: Chat with AI Agent](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#test-part-2-chat-with-ai-agent) 1. In the n8n workflow, locate the "Chat Trigger" node 2. Click on the "Chat Trigger" node to open it 3. Click "Test Chat" or open the chat interface 4. Type "hello" in the chat 5. Verify that the OpenAI agent returns a response ### 7\. Troubleshooting [Permalink: 7. Troubleshooting](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#7-troubleshooting) If any node fails: - Check that the credentials are properly configured and authorized - Verify that the spreadsheet ID is correct - Ensure your API keys are valid and have sufficient quota/credits - Check the error messages in n8n for specific issues - Make sure your Google account has necessary permissions ## Success Criteria [Permalink: Success Criteria](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#success-criteria) Your setup is complete when: - ✅ All nodes in the manual trigger flow execute successfully (green status) - ✅ A text file "n8n-workshop-test.txt" is created in your Google Drive - ✅ The Google Sheets node successfully reads your name from the spreadsheet - ✅ A draft email with subject "n8n workshop draft" appears in your Gmail drafts - ✅ The Apify HTTP Request node returns a successful response - ✅ The Supabase vector table `n8n_workshop_documents` is created successfully - ✅ The chat trigger responds to your "hello" message with an AI-generated response - ✅ No error messages appear in the workflow execution ## Support [Permalink: Support](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#support) If you encounter issues during setup, please reach out before the workshop so we can help you resolve them. ## About Test n8n credentials before workshop ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep#readme-ov-file) ### Uh oh! There was an error while loading. [Please reload this page](https://github.com/GiladShoham/n8n-workshop-prep).
